title: Chenchen
description: Chenchen Zhao is a Senior Language Lecturer of Chinese at NYU Shanghai. She holds an MA from East China Normal University and a BA from Xiamen University.Zhao’s research interests are in teaching Chinese language through the use of drama and theatrics and in Chinese writing. EducationMA, Teaching
text:
Chenchen Zhao
Chenchen Zhao is a Senior Language Lecturer of Chinese at NYU Shanghai. She holds an MA from East China Normal University and a BA from Xiamen University.
Zhao’s research interests are in teaching Chinese language through the use of drama and theatrics and in Chinese writing.
Education
